summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Share Feature and My Notes Feature for Solomon AI Church Management System. Both features are fully functional with database persistence.

issues: Edit button not present on note cards (only Share and Delete visible) - may need to add Edit functionality

seed_data_creation: Test notes created and cleaned up via backend test suite
context_for_next_testing_agent: Share and Notes features are fully functional. Backend APIs tested: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE video-notes, GET video-notes/shared, POST video-notes/{id}/share, GET church-members. All 15 pytest tests pass. UI tested via Playwright: Share modal opens from hero button and video card hover, Notes panel opens with video info, note creation works with toast confirmation, tabs switch correctly, share note modal works.
